title: Ethan Mollick @emollick · 19小时 Some (early) evidence that managers have the highest success rate in using Claude Code for coding.
summary: Ethan Mollick @emollick · 19小时 Some (early) evidence that managers have the highest success rate in using Claude Code for coding.
